review: The app doesn't let you order more than half of the time. It is frustrating and charges more than in store
Latest update is so buggy. It charges me and then hangs and crashes. Order never goes through

McDonalds is not what it used to be. I remember my high school friends flipping burgers for them in the 80's. Now they come out of a microwave. I try not to go there anymore. Cheap food at a fairly high price.
